name: Papita Lassi (Papaya Lassi)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Papaya, ripe, diced and mashed
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat or blend the yogurt until smooth.
2. Add water and beat again to combine.
3. Incorporate the mashed papaya along with lime juice, salt, and pepper.
4. Blend until well combined.
5. Pour into individual glasses.
6. Garnish with mint sprigs and serve cold.
If you prefer a sweeter version, omit the salt, lime juice, and pepper. Add 2 tablespoons of sugar instead and flavor with rose water.
